list.name: Changes
list.comment: refactor(Out): Move Out namespace to libhelper

project.component: { "keyToString": { "C/C++ File.main.cpp.executor": "Run", "CMake Application.CLI11-generate-single-file.executor": "Run", "CMake Application.docs.executor": "Run", "CMake Application.libhelper_shared.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.RadMigrateCodeStyle": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "RunOnceActivity.west.config.association.type.startup.service": "true", "SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "SHELLCHECK.PATH": "I do mind", "Shell Script.Build (Debug).executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Build.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Cleanup generated docs.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Cleanup.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Open Shell.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Push To Device.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Reformat And Push Code.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Reformat Code.executor": "Run", "bazel.project.detector.is.bazel.project": "true", "cf.advertisement.text.overridden": "true", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "deletionFromPopupRequiresConfirmation": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "last_opened_file_path": "/home/yzbruh/IdeaProjects/pmt-renovated/build/scripts/build.sh", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "project.propVCSSupport.DirectoryMappings", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value: adb shell; adb shell su -c rm -f /data/local/tmp/pmt_static exit $?

option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value: build/scripts/reformat.sh && git add . && git commit -m "pmt: reformat code" && proxychains git push

task.summary: Default task
pmt: reformat code and improve workflow
pmt: fixup manager.sh
pmt: improve libhelper, etc.
pmt: add stdin parsing support, etc.
pmt: add random number generator class (compile-time, with templates)
pmt: cleanup PureTuple class.
pmt: improve PureTuple class.
pmt: improve PureTuple class and improve function manager.
pmt: reformat code, etc.
pmt: Add new type (class) to libhelper, etc. - Add Helper::Capsule. - Fix some compilation errors.
pmt: Improve libhelper, etc.
pmt: Improve libpartition_map, etc.
pmt: continue working. - Improve libhelper's android functions.
github: fixup workflow - Use `cp src/plugins/*plugin.so` instead of `cp src/*plugin.so`.
build.sh: Improve argument processing and add new flags (to make architectural selection easier).
libcrypto: Instead of using the prebuilt libcrypto, compile from source. - Add new CMake functions (functions.cmake).
pmt: start working on 1.7.0
build.sh: Stop embroidering -G* flags
scripts: move scripts into build/scripts and fixup argument processing of build.sh and reformat.sh
pmt: reformat code, etc. - Add git hook for pushs.
build.sh: add command for configuring git hooks.
git: Correct the logical fallacy in githooks.
libhelper: finalize documentation. - git: fixup pre-commit. - scripts: reformat.sh: Print only the names of the formatted files to the terminal.
git: fixup pre-commit
doxygen: add tagfile of cppreference.com
doxygen: fixup syntax
doxygen: finalize documentation, etc. - libhelper & libpartition_map: improve concepts, etc.
doxygen: add main page content
doxygen: improve build instructions on the main page
github: setting up pages.
doxygen: fixup main page
doxygen: improve documentation
manager: improve installer script
documentation: add new doc, etc.
doxygen: add missing md file to inputs.
documentation: add new documentation: Example Plugins (Writing plugins)
github: fixup deployer
manager: fixup installing from wrong tag
documentation: add plugin examples to documentation, etc.
plugins: update BackupPlugin, FlashPlugin and ErasePlugin - Add buffer size limits, etc.
plugins: simplify the structure
plugins: update plugin examples.

docs(documentation-mainpage,CONTRUBUTING): update maninpage of wiki and create contributing guide
- Contributing document should have been included much earlier. Even though it's late, adding it was necessary.
docs(README): fixup format, etc.

refactor(CommandLine): CLI11 usage has been discontinued.
- Cleaned from CMake scripts and git modules.

refactor(CommandLine,libhelper)!: Switch to the built-in, dedicated command-line handler.
- For greater control, a dedicated command-line handler, libhelper!a, has been added in place of CLI11. - All necessary code integration has been completed. - It's not as good as CLI11, but at least it allows me to have much better control.

feat(CMDLine,Plugins): Add collections of checkers and callbacks.
- Apply to plugins.
fix(CMDLine): fixup CMDLine collections.
refactor(Out): Move Out namespace to libhelper

MESSAGE.value: doxygen: finalize documentation, etc. - libhelper & libpartition_map: improve concepts, etc.
doxygen: improve build instructions on the main page
doxygen: add missing md file to inputs.
documentation: add new documentation: Example Plugins (Writing plugins)
manager: fixup installing from wrong tag
documentation: add plugin examples to documentation, etc.
plugins: update BackupPlugin, FlashPlugin and ErasePlugin - Add buffer size limits, etc.

docs(documentation-mainpage,CONTRUBUTING): update maninpage of wiki and create contributing guide
- Contributing document should have been included much earlier. Even though it's late, adding it was necessary.

refactor(CommandLine): CLI11 usage has been discontinued.
- Cleaned from CMake scripts and git modules.

refactor(CommandLine,libhelper)!: Switch to the built-in, dedicated command-line handler.
- For greater control, a dedicated command-line handler, libhelper!a, has been added in place of CLI11. - All necessary code integration has been completed. - It's not as good as CLI11, but at least it allows me to have much better control.

feat(CMDLine,Plugins): Add collections of checkers and callbacks.
- Apply to plugins.
refactor(Out): Move Out namespace to libhelper

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: refactor(Out): Move Out namespace to libhelper
